verses.1: The LORD reigneth, he is clothed with majesty; the LORD is clothed with strength, with which he hath girded himself: the world also is established, that it cannot be moved.
verses.2: Thy throne is established of old: thou art from everlasting.
verses.3: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift their waves.
verses.4: The LORD on high is mightier than the noise of many waters, yes , than the mighty waves of the sea.
verses.5: Thy testimonies are very sure: holiness becometh thy house, O LORD, for ever.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
